_meta.description: Physical climate hazards. `engine_hazard_type` is the CLIMADA hazard tag; `future_source` notes how forward-looking hazard is obtained. Unsupported perils carry a `reason` explaining the data gap and the real path to add them.
_meta.provenance: Hazard availability verified against the live CLIMADA Data API catalogue (tropical_cyclone, river_flood, wildfire, storm_europe). See docs/METHODOLOGY.md.

perils.label: Tropical cyclone
perils.future_source: Data API future sets (rcp26/45/60/85 × ref_year 2040/2060/2080) + present 'None'

perils.label: River flood
perils.future_source: Data API river-flood depth (rcp26/60/85 × year_range; ISIMIP-derived) + historical baseline

perils.label: Wildfire
perils.future_source: Data API wildfire brightness-temperature (historical 2001–2020 only — no future set published)

perils.label: European windstorm
perils.future_source: Data API storm_europe CMIP6 winter-windstorm (SSP126/245/370/585) + present 'None'

perils.label: Earthquake (geophysical)
perils.future_source: Data API earthquake observed catalogue (MMI); geophysical — no climate scenario

perils.label: Coastal flood / sea-level rise
perils.future_source: WRI Aqueduct coastal inundation (inuncoast_*; rcp4.5/8.5 × 2030/2050/2080 + historical, with-subsidence) ingested to the local catalog; depth-damage curve

perils.label: Heatwave
perils.reason: Heat is modelled as labour-productivity / mortality impact, not direct asset damage; no CLIMADA asset-damage hazard set. Real path: OS-Climate physrisk chronic-heat indicators.

perils.label: Drought
perils.reason: Available only as agricultural yield loss (Data API relative_cropyield, historical+rcp60), not general asset damage. Real path: a crop-yield impact model for agriculture assets.

perils.label: Hail
perils.future_source: Locally-ingested hail hazard (e.g. MeteoSwiss MESHS) + indicative cm damage ramp

perils.label: TC storm surge
perils.future_source: climada_petals TCSurgeBathtub — bathtub surge from the TC wind hazard (catalog-first) + a Copernicus DEM (manual drop-in, CLIMATERISK_DEM_PATH); depth-damage curve

perils.label: Landslide
perils.future_source: Locally-ingested landslide hazard (e.g. NASA COOLR via climada_petals) + indicative probability damage ramp

perils.label: TC rainfall
perils.future_source: Locally-ingested TC-rainfall hazard (climada_petals TCRain from generated tracks) + indicative mm damage ramp
